description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical ceramic vase with a slightly tapered base and a wide, rounded mouth. The exterior is adorned with intricate, raised motifs resembling stylized animals and swirling foliage, rendered in a brownish glaze against a muted beige background. The rim features a subtle decorative band with small protruding lugs spaced evenly around the circumference, adding both visual and tactile interest. The surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, with visible hand-crafted details and some natural irregularities in the glaze. The interior appears hollow and unglazed, suggesting traditional pottery techniques. This vase exudes an antique, artisanal quality, making it suitable for display in urban parks, plazas, or as a decorative element in public gardens.
description: A tall, beige ceramic vase with raised brown motifs and a wide, rounded mouth, featuring decorative lugs and a matte, artisanal finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's wide mouth, prominent decorative lugs, and detailed swirling motifs on the body.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the motifs and the even spacing of the lugs around the rim.
description_view_2: Side view reveals more of the swirling patterns and the subtle tapering of the vase's body.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the continuous decorative motifs and the smooth, unbroken surface of the vase.
